word: G3363 - ἵνα μή - hína mḗ - hin'-ah may - Albeit not

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἵναμή

- Transliteration: Hina me

- Phonetic: hin'-ah may

- Definition:

1. lest, that ... not

- Origin: from G2443 and G3361

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Conjunction

- Strong's: That is G2443 and G3361; in order (or so) that not: - albeit not lest that no (-t [-thing]).
